questions.statement: What is one major benefit of increasing mental health awareness?
options: It makes people ashamed to talk about mental health /
It encourages early intervention and better long-term outcomes /
It encourages people to hide their mental health issues /
It discourages people from seeking treatment /

questions.statement: How does mental health awareness help reduce stigma?
options: By promoting a culture of silence around mental health issues /
By encouraging people to feel ashamed about seeking help /
By increasing knowledge and encouraging people to seek treatment /
By discouraging open discussions about mental health /

questions.statement: Why is early intervention important in mental health, according to the text?
options: It prevents people from discussing mental health issues /
It leads to better long-term outcomes and more successful therapy /
It makes mental health conditions worse /
It eliminates the need for therapy /

questions.statement: How does increasing public awareness of mental health conditions benefit the community?
options: By discouraging individuals from seeking treatment /
By helping people offer sympathy and support to those experiencing challenges /
By making it harder to find mental health services /
By ignoring the symptoms and conditions of mental health /

questions.statement: What does the text suggest about a society that values mental health awareness?
options: It only cares about physical health /
It creates an environment where people feel judged for seeking help /
It prioritizes the overall welfare of its people /
It ignores the importance of mental well-being /
